channel.title: Home on ehrror
channel.description: Recent content in Home on ehrror

item.title: About
item.description: Welcome to ehrror, by Justin Ehringhaus. This is my canvas for weaving thoughts, ideas, and discoveries. This space is born from a fascination with the beauty of languages, the power of technology, and the hidden patterns in data. Just as the intricacies of a language can reveal the depths of a culture, so too can the patterns in data reveal the underlying narratives of our world. I hope to break down the barriers between us and these narratives.

item.title: Visualizing the Heartbeat of a City
item.description: How can we use data to visualize the heartbeat of a city? The answer lies in a unique blend of analytics and insight. For the past several weeks, I’ve investigated and visualized a city’s 311 requests as part of my degree coursework on interactive dashboards. These requests cover a range of non-urgent issues, from public roads and services to violations, disputes, and more. Admittedly, this dataset is a narrow window into a city and its heartbeat, but it has served to illustrate how a larger, more comprehensive dataset might present a deeper understanding of city dynamics.
